name: AnomalyDetection
description: Isolation Forest anomaly detection — identifies outliers in network traffic, system behavior, and sensor data. Runs in gage_env. Trinity-Ready Phase 1.
author: Victory

tools.name: anomaly_status
tools.description: AnomalyDetection status — model trained state and path

tools.name: anomaly_train
tools.description: Train the Isolation Forest model on baseline data — comma-separated values or file path

tools.name: anomaly_scan
tools.description: Scan data for anomalies — comma-separated values or file path. Returns normal/ANOMALY per sample.
